programme.title: Into The Badlands
programme.desc: Sunny and Bajie reunite with M.K. but also face a dangerous enemy from Bajie's past. The Widow makes an unholy alliance with Quinn.

programme.title: Duke - Back In The Future
programme.desc: We'll catch you later on DUKE.

programme.title: On Duke Today...
programme.desc: Here's what's on DUKE today.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Treehouse of Horror
programme.desc: The annual terror-themed special, including a frightening look at the 2020 election, parodies of Pixar and "Spider-Man: Into the Spider-Verse" and a ninth birthday Lisa just can't get over.

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: When Marge and the kids take a seaside vacation, Homer is unwittingly tempted by a British femme fatale.

programme.title: Fresh Off The Boat
programme.desc: It's Louis and Jessica's wedding anniversary and Louis plans a romantic evening out to the car dealership. Meanwhile, Evan and his 'friends' help Eddie buy The Hot Dogger.

programme.title: American Pickers
programme.desc: Mike visits the Virginia birthplace of a high-speed camera that changed the world. Meanwhile in Nashville, a music guru has some sobering news about Danielle's rock'n'roll gamble.

programme.title: Alone
programme.desc: Ten new participants must survive in the Great Karoo desert as they face extreme temperatures, new species of predators and a host of exhausting challenges.

programme.title: Curse Of Oak Island
programme.desc: Season Premiere: Armed with scientific evidence that there are massive amounts of silver in the soil near the Money Pit, Rick, Marty and the team return to Oak Island, closer to solving the mystery.

programme.title: Hyundai Country Calendar
programme.desc: A dairying family shares its experience of organic farming and give cautionary tales to other farmers.

programme.title: Hyundai Country Calendar
programme.desc: A Westland family catch whitebait for a living so they can stay in an unspoiled spot.

programme.title: Trucking Hell
programme.desc: Weekend traffic grinds to a halt when a fully laden fruit and vegetable lorry rolls over. Roadside teams from a recovery company arrive to upend the truck.

programme.title: American Pickers
programme.desc: The team explores a Milwaukee collector's home, discovering rare breweriana, vintage pinball machines, and Elvis memorabilia. Robbie searches for a woody trailer, while Mike focuses on rare Harley.

programme.title: The Office U.S
programme.desc: Oscar informs Michael that the office must spend a $4300 surplus or lose it in next year's budget. Meanwhile, Dwight takes Angela and Andy to Schrute Farms to work on their wedding plans.

programme.title: Fresh Off The Boat
programme.desc: After coming out of the closet to Honey and Jessica, Nicole struggles with telling Marvin, fearful that her father will be disappointed in her.

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Grampa is accused of a crime; Kent Brockman questions his career.

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Bart becomes a voice-over actor. Comic Book Guy is humiliated at Comic-Con. Lisa is set up for a fall.

programme.title: New: Rookie Truckers
programme.desc: Eric gets his 60-metre super-quad wrapped around a roundabout while 22-year-old Roy takes on his first ever triple trailer job.

programme.title: Adventure Gold Diggers
programme.desc: Another breakdown triggers all out war between the Clermont Diggers and the Rookie Miners. And a monster storm gets Gold Sniper and new dad-to-be Rob stranded in the Tasmanian wilderness.

programme.title: Outrageous Fortune
programme.desc: Loretta reels before a nemesis as she faces her future; and Cheryl fears her nemesis is still pulling strings.

programme.title: Head High
programme.desc: The whanau come together to remember their brother; Aria makes a disheartening discover; Tai tries to trust his gut.

programme.title: Into The Badlands
programme.desc: Sunny struggles with his inner demons as his friends find a way to help him.

programme.title: Into The Badlands
programme.desc: Sunny makes a deal with Baron Chau in order to take down Quinn, causing his allies to question his loyalties.

programme.title: Duke - Back In The Future
programme.desc: We'll catch you later on DUKE.

programme.title: On Duke Today...
programme.desc: Here's what's on DUKE today.

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Grampa is accused of a crime; Kent Brockman questions his career.

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Bart becomes a voice-over actor. Comic Book Guy is humiliated at Comic-Con. Lisa is set up for a fall.

programme.title: Fresh Off The Boat
programme.desc: As Eddie's first school dance approaches, Louis is determined to make the night as perfect as a John Hughes film.

programme.title: American Pickers
programme.desc: The team explores a Milwaukee collector's home, discovering rare breweriana, vintage pinball machines, and Elvis memorabilia. Robbie searches for a woody trailer, while Mike focuses on rare Harley.

programme.title: Alone
programme.desc: Ten new participants must survive in the Great Karoo desert as they face extreme temperatures, new species of predators and a host of exhausting challenges.

programme.title: Curse Of Oak Island
programme.desc: Armed with scientific evidence that there are massive amounts of silver in the soil near the Money Pit, Rick, Marty and the team return to Oak Island.

programme.title: Hyundai Country Calendar
programme.desc: A mixed farm where wool, meat and cropping all fight for supremacy.

programme.title: Hyundai Country Calendar
programme.desc: The pull of the remote Muzzle Station sees the next generation return to where they grew up.

programme.title: Trucking Hell
programme.desc: It's a baptism of fire for rookie recovery op Callum when a he is called to tackle a serious blaze. On a housing estate in Corby in Northamptonshire, a driver is tasked with a delicate rescue.

programme.title: American Pickers
programme.desc: At Uncle Butch's farm, the Wolfe brothers pay a lot of money for a pair of rare nuggets of petroliana.

programme.title: The Office U.S
programme.desc: Andy finds out that Angela and Dwight have been having an affair and he challenges Dwight to a duel. Michael goes to Corporate in New York for a meeting with David Wallace.

programme.title: Fresh Off The Boat
programme.desc: Louis tries to play matchmaker for Grandma and her English teacher; Grandma offers to cook the entire Thanksgiving meal to show her appreciation; Evan tries to prove he is mature.

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Odd couple Skinner and Chalmers embark on an 800-mile car ride to Cincinnati to attend an administrator's convention.

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Lisa calls her teacher, Ms. Hoover, a hack and refuses to apologise. Lisa learns Ms. Hoover's private pain.

programme.title: Family Guy
programme.desc: Season Premiere: The Griffins perform a retelling of three Oscar-winning stories: "Silence of the Lambs," "American Beauty" and "Forrest Gump.".

programme.title: Family Guy
programme.desc: Resolved to enjoy a family movie night, the Griffins take a road trip to Bend, Oregon, to rent a VHS from the last Blockbuster in existence.

programme.title: Family Guy
programme.desc: Joe accidentally sees Lois naked, leading to a reinvigoration of his sex life with Bonnie; Stewie is gifted an electric SUV and quickly embodies the `Range Rover' lifestyle.

programme.title: Family Guy
programme.desc: Lois hypnotizes Peter into satisfying her sexual proclivities; Stewie renovates his treehouse in an attempt to win over Brian and Chris.

programme.title: Family Guy
programme.desc: Cleveland is fired as a postman after a mishap, but flourishes in his new job at the brewery.

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation
programme.desc: The team are called to a murder scene at a familiar motel, with Nick piecing together evidence from three separate murder investigations that all took place at the same establishment.

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation
programme.desc: Langston and Riley are taken hostage during the aftermath of a shootout in a normally quiet Las Vegas community.

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation
programme.desc: The CSI team delves into the world of Mexican wrestling when one of Langston's former students is found murdered.
